creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Didn't even remember that I still "maintained" this port.
Upstream is mostly dead, last real release was nearly 4 years ago; 5.3 is still considered "development" and was released last (but not even properly announced) 3 years ago. I don't even have a supported (by this port) printer for years, so now it's up for grabs.
